title: Lard Velvet Low-Sodium Irish Stir-Fry
description: A light and velvety dish featuring lard in a low-sodium-friendly preparation that combines the flavors of Ireland with its signature butter in a unique way.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add lard and let it melt.
Add onion, garlic, and bell peppers to the skillet. Stir occasionally until slightly softened, about 3 minutes.
Stir in green beans and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until just tender.
Sprinkle thyme over vegetables, then add low-sodium soy sauce. Mix well to combine.
Gradually pour water into the skillet while constantly stirring to prevent lard from burning. Stir until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for about 5 minutes or until the liquid is mostly absorbed, allowing flavors to meld together.
